ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "iso3" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population_size" TEXT /* Current population size */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Official or primary language of the country */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone(s) of the country */,
  "geographic_region" TEXT /* Geographic region (e.g., Asia, Africa) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the dataset belongs to */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of data in the dataset (e.g., population, GDP, life expectancy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the dataset */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the dataset was updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the dataset is public or private */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the dataset (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the version is the current active version */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the version (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset version the data point belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data point represents */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data point */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect the data */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the data point */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES dataset_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset type (e.g., population, GDP, life expectancy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the dataset type */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset version the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for the file to ensure data integrity */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the file is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES dataset_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset version the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for the file to ensure data integrity */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the file is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES dataset_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging in */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the team is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_teams_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (researcher or data analyst) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the member joined the team */,
  "left_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the member left the team */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the member is active in the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
